/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_iie_lc_paging.dir/iie_lc_paging_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_lc_paging.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_lc_paging.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_lc_paging.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_lc_paging.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_lc_paging.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_lc_paging.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_lc_paging.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_iie_lc_paging.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_iie_lc_paging  -ldl -lm
